title: Past & Future: Urban Townhouse Fusion Study
fullPrompt: A conceptual architectural illustration of urban townhouse combining an old building with minimalist new features. The entire composition is surrounded by hand-drawn architectural annotations, technical sketches, and typographic elements, resembling a studio design presentation board. Mixed media style blending photorealistic rendering and architectural hand-drawing.
author: Admin

title: Blueprint of Chaos — Architectural Grunge Portrait
fullPrompt: An architectural-grunge sketch portrait of a man wearing a suit, captured in a mid-up body composition. Use harsh, broken black lines resembling dry-ink strokes, charcoal smudges, and distressed textures. Combine these with thin, technical blueprint scribbles, structural grids, measurement marks, and overlapping mechanical diagrams - all rendered with a worn, scratched, and weathered appearance
author: Admin

title: Blueprint of Vision — Drafted Mind Portrait
fullPrompt: A blueprint-style artistic drawing of a smiling young man on blue grid paper, detailed pencil sketch with labels pointing to his head reading "VISION," "FOCUS," and "RESILIENCE." The blueprint sheet lies on a wooden desk surrounded by drafting tools like a pencil, metal ruler, triangle scale, rolled-up paper tube, and a cup of coffee. Warm ambient lighting creates a professional and creative atmosphere. Highly detailed, top-down perspective.
author: Admin

title: Drawn Reflections — The Sketch Behind the Smile
fullPrompt: A stylish young man with wavy, medium-length black hair and a beard is standing confidently in front of a wall featuring a large, realistic pencil sketch of his face. He is wearing a black hoodie, light grey pants, and a silver wristwatch. The man stands with his arms crossed and smiles warmly, matching the expression in the sketch behind him. The background is simple and neutral, focusing attention on the subject and the artwork.
author: Admin
